name: E-commerce & DTC
description: Buyer prompts tuned for e-commerce, DTC brands, marketplaces, and fulfilment/logistics services.

prompts.text: What are the best {industry} platforms for launching a DTC brand in 2026?
Which {industry} tools integrate best with Shopify?
What are the top-rated {industry} apps for recovering abandoned carts?
Which {industry} platforms handle subscriptions and recurring orders best?
Compare the top {industry} solutions for a store doing $5M/year in revenue.
What are the best {industry} tools for international shipping and tax?
Which {industry} brands are winning on TikTok and Instagram right now?
What are the best emerging {industry} platforms to watch?
Which {industry} apps have the best reputation for customer support?
What {industry} tool would you recommend for a 2-person founding team?
